sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_interval (id INT PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL SECOND);
INSERT INTO test_interval (id, duration) VALUES (1, INTERVAL '15.500' SECOND);
UPDATE test_interval SET duration = INTERVAL '30.250' SECOND WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration FROM test_interval WHERE duration > INTERVAL '10.000' SECOND;
DELETE FROM test_interval WHERE duration = INTERVAL '15.500' SECOND;
